headline: A Look At Lamb Weston (LW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What Lamb Weston’s Share Slide Tells You Right Now Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) has seen its share price under pressure recently, with a month return of about 17% decline and a past 3 months return of roughly 7% decline, putting renewed focus on its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Lamb Weston Holdings. With the share price at about $40.00, Lamb Weston’s recent 17.1% 1 month share price decline sits on top of a 22.5% 1 year total shareholder return decline and a much deeper 3 year total...
